content.query:
-- 1. find patient age by token and dos_begin year from the incremental claims data
delete from appl.abco_inc_claims_age_by_year_t;
insert into appl.abco_inc_claims_age_by_year_t
(
	token
    , dos_year
    , patient_age
)
SELECT distinct 
    a.token
    , a.dos_year
    , a.patient_age
from
    (
        SELECT distinct token, try_cast(substring(DOS_BEGIN, 1, 4) as integer) as dos_year, try_cast(a.patient_age as integer) as patient_age
        FROM customer.ext_inc_claims_9156974_SS_1_t a 
        where a.patient_age is not null
        and a.patient_age <> ''
        and try_cast(a.patient_age as integer) is not null
        union
        SELECT distinct token, try_cast(substring(DOS_BEGIN, 1, 4) as integer) as dos_year, try_cast(a.patient_age as integer) as patient_age
        FROM customer.ext_inc_claims_9156974_SS_2_t a 
        where a.patient_age is not null
        and a.patient_age <> ''
        and try_cast(a.patient_age as integer) is not null
        union
        SELECT distinct token, try_cast(substring(DOS_BEGIN, 1, 4) as integer) as dos_year, try_cast(a.patient_age as integer) as patient_age
        FROM customer.ext_inc_claims_9156974_SS_3_t a 
        where a.patient_age is not null
        and a.patient_age <> ''
        and try_cast(a.patient_age as integer) is not null
        union
        SELECT distinct token, try_cast(substring(DOS_BEGIN, 1, 4) as integer) as dos_year, try_cast(a.patient_age as integer) as patient_age
        FROM customer.ext_inc_claims_9156974_SS_4_t a 
        where a.patient_age is not null
        and a.patient_age <> ''
        and try_cast(a.patient_age as integer) is not null
        union
        SELECT distinct token, try_cast(substring(DOS_BEGIN, 1, 4) as integer) as dos_year, try_cast(a.patient_age as integer) as patient_age
        FROM customer.ext_inc_claims_9156974_SS_5_t a 
        where a.patient_age is not null
        and a.patient_age <> ''
        and try_cast(a.patient_age as integer) is not null
        union
        SELECT distinct token, try_cast(substring(DOS_BEGIN, 1, 4) as integer) as dos_year, try_cast(a.patient_age as integer) as patient_age
        FROM customer.ext_inc_claims_9156974_SS_6_t a 
        where a.patient_age is not null
        and a.patient_age <> ''
        and try_cast(a.patient_age as integer) is not null
    ) a
where 
    a.dos_year is not null
;
go


-- 2. add new age by year to the existing ones, saved for future reference to correct patient ages
insert into appl.abco_claims_age_by_year_t 
(
	token
    , dos_year
    , patient_age
)
select
	s.token
    , s.dos_year
    , s.patient_age
from 
    appl.abco_inc_claims_age_by_year_t as s
WHERE 
    NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT token FROM appl.abco_claims_age_by_year_t a 
        WHERE a.token = s.token AND a.dos_year = s.dos_year and a.patient_age = s.patient_age
    );


-- 3. find the corrected age by token and dos_begin year
delete from appl.abco_claims_corrected_age_t;
insert into  appl.abco_claims_corrected_age_t
(
	token
  , dos_year
  , min_patient_age
  , diff_patient_age
  , cnt_patient_age
) 
select token, dos_year
  , min(case when patient_age > 85 then 85 when patient_age < 1 then 1 else patient_age end) as min_patient_age
  , max(case when patient_age > 85 then 85 when patient_age < 1 then 1 else patient_age end) - min(case when patient_age > 85 then 85 when patient_age < 1 then 1 else patient_age end) as diff_patient_age
  , count(distinct case when patient_age > 85 then 85 when patient_age < 1 then 1 else patient_age end) as cnt_patient_age
from 
    appl.abco_claims_age_by_year_t
group by 
    token, dos_year
having count(distinct case when patient_age > 85 then 85 when patient_age < 1 then 1 else patient_age end) = 2 
  and max(case when patient_age > 85 then 85 when patient_age < 1 then 1 else patient_age end) - min(case when patient_age > 85 then 85 when patient_age < 1 then 1 else patient_age end) = 1
;
